# M4 Workflow - Recommendation & Review

## Owner
- Recommendation Logic Agent

## Supporting
- Backend API Agent
- Frontend Dashboard Agent
- Async Pipeline Agent
- QA & Reliability Agent

## Must Deliver
- recommendation run/candidate/evidence 생성
- 추천 Top N + 이유 + 위험도 UI
- approve/reject/modify/apply 플로우

## Exit Gate
- 추천 생성→placement 생성 E2E 성공
- 리뷰 액션 이력 저장 검증
